violations.text: Left side of walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 46 DF. No TCS foods were stored in left side of unit at the time of inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in left side of unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or lower. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The ceiling tiles in the storefront area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024

The left side of the walk-in cooler was observed held at 57 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All TCS foods on the left side of the unit were observed between 56-59 DF. Per PIC delivery was made on Monday afternoon 8/12/2024. All TCS foods were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. No TCS foods are to be stored in unit until it is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or below. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2024
The ceiling tiles in the storefront area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2024
